metadata.description: Run-time operations & incident response for live Solana protocols.

plugins.name: solana-protocol-ops
plugins.description: SRE / incident-commander for live Solana protocols: invariant monitoring, drain detection, incident runbooks, fund-tracing forensics with freeze-actionability scoring, recovery/negotiation, and post-mortem feedback loops. Data engine: Helius + Surfpool MCPs.
